sections.title: 1. Unnecessary Re-renders
2. Redundant Per-Frame Computations (Canvas render loop)
3. Memory Leak Risk
4. Caching Opportunity
sections.content:
**`StadiumCanvas.tsx:447` — `getCanvasPowerSpeed` recomputed in effect deps**

The function is recreated every render and called inside the animation loop. Since it's a simple linear formula from `shotCount`, inline it or read from `stateRef`:

```tsx
// In the animation frame (already reads from stateRef), just inline:
const speed = 2.4 + (state.shotCount - 1) * 0.7;
```

---

sections.title: Summary Table
sections.content:
| Issue | File | Impact | Fix |
|---|---|---|---|
| `power` in keydown effect deps | `GameUI.tsx:129` | High — 60 listener re-registers/sec | Use a ref for `power` |
| `getElementById` per frame | `StadiumCanvas.tsx:725-743` | Medium — 120 DOM queries/sec | Cache elements before `render()` |
| Gradient objects per frame | `StadiumCanvas.tsx:765,860` | Medium — GC pressure at 60fps | Create once, reuse in loop |
| Crowd `Math.sin` per dot | `StadiumCanvas.tsx:806-824` | Medium — ~1800 iterations/frame | Pre-compute static color data |
| `FlagBadge` not memoized | `FlagBadge.tsx` | Medium — 96 re-renders on selection | `React.memo` |
| `setTimeout` no cleanup | `StadiumCanvas.tsx:586` | Low — potential setState on unmount | `clearTimeout` in cleanup |
| `bgAudioRef` not paused | `StadiumCanvas.tsx` | Low — audio leak on unmount | Pause in cleanup |
| Inline `onAnimationTriggered` | `App.tsx:347` | Low — new ref each render | `useCallback` with `[]` |

codeBlocks.code:
// Every render creates a new function reference
<StadiumCanvas onAnimationTriggered={() => {}} ... />

// Called every frame (~60fps) — allocates a new gradient object each time
const skyGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, dimensions.height * 0.4);

// In the animation frame (already reads from stateRef), just inline:
const speed = 2.4 + (state.shotCount - 1) * 0.7;
